global.expiry_alert_title: Kodhi yako yekunyoresa yava kuda kupera
global.expiry_alert_text: Kodhi yako yekunyoresa iri kupera munguva pfupi iri kutevera ({daysValue} mazuva asara). Mushure mekupera, iwe hauchakwanisa kuwana account yako. Ndokumbirawo usvike kune wako cohort maneja kana murairidzi kuti adzidze maitiro ekuwedzera mukana.
global.under_maintenance_message: Parizvino tiri kugadzirisa zvakarongwa kuti uvandudze ruzivo rwako.
global.under_maintenance_description: Ndokumbira udzoke gare gare. Tinokumbira ruregerero kune chero dambudziko.
global.delete_tranlate_confirmation: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima shanduro iyi?
global.injector_activity_directions: Ndokumbirawo zadza musiyano nemajekiseni esaline ega nemavhoriyamu akakodzera anodiwa kuita iyi {bodyPartName} bvunzo. Kana mavhoriyamu asarudzwa, sarudza bhatani re "NEXT" kuti uenderere mberi.
global.patient_position_directions: Ndapota sarudza nzvimbo yemurwere yaungade kuti uite iyi {bodyPartName} bvunzo. Kana chinzvimbo chasarudzwa, sarudza "NEXT" bhatani kuti uenderere mberi.
global.patient_landmarking_directions: Uchishandisa mabhatani elaser nemabhatani ekufambisa, ndapota fambisa murwere netafura kunzvimbo yaunoda kuvaisa mucherechedzo kuti igadzirwe mukati meiyi {bodyPartName} bvunzo uye sarudza "Simbisa Landmark". Kana chiratidzo chasarudzwa, sarudza bhatani re "NEXT" kuti uenderere mberi.
global.patient_position_is_incorrect: Nzvimbo yako yemurwere yaunosarudza haina kururama.  Ndokumbirawo uite sarudzo yako inotevera kubva munzvimbo dzinogona kuitika dzevarwere dzakanyorwa pazasi.
global.delete_all_point_selection: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima mapoinzi ese?
global.delete_all_sat_band: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima yese sat band zone?
global.set_scan_description: Kana iwe uchida kushandisa iyo "Set Kunonoka" nzira yeKuona chikamu chenguva, Ndokumbira uise kunonoka kwe scan mumibvunzo yaunoda iwe pachako.
global.is_contrast_duration_greater_than_scan_d: Scan Duration (UI) haigone kudarika Contrast duration (injector UI).
global.is_contrast_duration_longer_than_scan_du: Nguva yekuenzanisa haigoni kudarika masekonzi mashanu kureba kupfuura nguva yescan.
global.delete_this_profile: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima chimiro ichi?
global.create_new_profile: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kugadzira chimiro chitsva?
global.duplicate_profile: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kutevedzera chimiro ichi?
global.save_all_patient_positions: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kuchengetedza nzvimbo dzese dzevarwere dzenhengo dzese dzemuviri dzemhando yakasarudzwa?

Privacy.automated_information_collection_descrip: Tinogona kuunganidza otomatiki rumwe ruzivo paunoshanyira kana kushandisa yedu Saiti. Ruzivo urwu rungasanganisira yako IP kero (kana imwe yakasarudzika mudziyo identifier, kusanganisira yatingagopa); mamwe mashoko pamusoro pebrowser yako, sisitimu yekushandisa, uye hardware; nzvimbo yako, kana iripo; iyo URL yakakuendesa kuSaiti yedu; zviitiko zvako paSiti yedu, kusanganisira zvaunofarira; uye mamwe mashoko ekutema matanda, akadai sezuva nenguva yekushanya kwako. Tinogona kushandisa akasiyana matekinoroji ekutevera kuunganidza otomatiki ruzivo, senge makuki, mabhikoni ewebhu, zvinyorwa zvakamisikidzwa, browser yeminwe, GPS, iBeacons, uye ETags (kana "entity tags"). Kuki (kana "chinhu chakagovaniswa munharaunda") ifaira re data rakaiswa pachishandiso chako paunoshanyira yedu Saiti. Browser yako, kana imwe software (kusanganisira Adobe Flash), inogona kukubvumidza kuti urambe kana kubvisa makuki, asi kana ukadaro, mamwe maficha eSaiti yedu anogona kusashanda nemazvo, uye isu tingatadza kuyeuka zvaunoda nguva inotevera yaunoshanyira. Isu tinogona zvakare kushandisa web server logs kuunganidza uye kuchengetedza ruzivo nezve Saiti kushandiswa. Paunoshanyira Saiti yedu kubva panharembozha, senge smartphone, isu tinogona zvakare kuunganidza rumwe ruzivo kubva kune chako kifaa, kusanganisira kwaunogara, chiziviso chemudziyo, uye ruzivo nezve nharembozha yako.

Iwe une mhosva kune chero kudyidzana neSaiti kunoitika kuburikidza neakaundi yako pachako, zvisinei nekuti kushandiswa kwakadaro hakuna kutenderwa kana nevechitatu bato. Ndokumbira uchengete zita rako rekushandisa nepassword zvakachengeteka uye usarege chero munhu upi zvake ashandise ruzivo rweakaundi yako kuwana iyo Saiti.

Aya masevhisi anogona kuteedzera ruzivo nezve zviitiko zvako zvepamhepo nekufamba kwenguva uye munzvimbo dzakasiyana siyana. Aya masevhisi anotibatsira kuvandudza saiti yedu. Aya masevhisi anogona zvakare kutibvumira kukupa yakanangwa kushambadzira kana zvimwe zvirimo zvaungade nazvo zvichibva pane zvaunoita pamhepo. Unogona kudzidza zvakawanda nezveGoogle Analytics uye sarudzo dzako pane iyi link. Kana uchida kudzidza zvakawanda pamusoro pezvishambadzo zvakanangwa zvingangobva pane zvaunoita padandemutande (uye sarudzo dzaungaite kune mamwe masaiti nevashambadzi) ungada kushanyira {networkAdvertisingLink} kana {digitalAdvertisingLink} Mawebhusaiti. Kuti usarudze kuteverwa neGoogle Analytics pamawebhusaiti ese, shanyira: {googleOptOutLink}.

Semuenzaniso, tinogona kugovera ruzivo nechikoro chako, sangano kana mushandirwi uye nevanopa masevhisi vanotibatsira mumabasa edu ebhizinesi. Isu tinogona zvakare kugovera ruzivo kana zvichidikanwa nemutemo kana kugutsa chero mutemo unoshanda, mutemo, subpoena, chikumbiro chehurumende, kana mamwe maitiro emutemo. Isu tinogona zvakare kugovera ruzivo nevechitatu mapato, kusanganisira vemutemo, kuchengetedza yedu Saiti uye kusimbisa yedu Mitemo Yekushandisa. Isu tinochengetawo kodzero yekugovera ruzivo rwatinounganidza nevanotitsigira uye vatinodyidzana navo uye nechero muridzi anotevera muchiitiko chekubatana, kubatanidzwa, kutengeswa kwezvinhu zvedu, kana imwe shanduko mubhizinesi redu.

Iwe unofanirwa kuongorora zvakavanzika zveavo vanozivikanwa mapato echitatu kuti unzwisise kuti vanounganidza nekushandisa sei ruzivo.
